design_system.concept: Rustic Elegance - Elevating the traditional homemade Canarian food experience into a highly sensory, deeply textured digital journey. Evokes the warmth of the Mediterranean, terracotta clay, and fresh ingredients.

typography.rules: The Anti-Default Rule: Never use Inter or generic sans for headings.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8 to p-24 for section padding to create breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The Bento Grid (Mode A) for the Menu Highlights and About sections to create asymmetry. Avoid perfectly symmetrical Bootstrap columns.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Flat solid surfaces with 1px subtle borders (#E5DFD3). NO glassmorphism for this earthy theme.

logo.description: White cursive letters 'Casa Juan' on black background. Placement: Header and Footer. IMPORTANT: Since the logo has a black background, the Header and Footer MUST have a matching deep black/charcoal background (#1A1A1A or #000000) so the logo blends seamlessly.

hero_image.description: A beautiful table spread with plates and bowls of food, capturing the Mediterranean dining vibe.

interior_vibe.description: Inviting rustic bistro interior featuring wooden chairs and warm charm.

food_highlight_1.description: Vibrant spread of Spanish tapas (patatas bravas, bread with tomato) on a table.

food_highlight_2.description: Delicious Spanish toast topped with ham and cheese served outdoors.

sections.name: Navigation Header
sections.details: Sticky dark header (bg-[#1A1A1A]) to seamlessly blend the black-background logo. Links in white/off-white. Multi-language selector (ES/EN/DE) as a clean text dropdown. CTA button 'Reservar' in Terracotta (#C05A46).

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.details: Full width or large bento hero. Use 'hero_image' with a maximum bg-black/40 overlay. Headline: 'Auténtica Comida Casera Canaria' (or language equivalent). High contrast text, elegant serif.

sections.name: Trust & Stats Ribbon
sections.details: A horizontal bar or bento section highlighting: 4.7⭐ Rating, 1900+ Reseñas, and 'Precio: 10-20€'. Use the 'Accent Sage' color for the stars to feel organic, not harsh yellow.

sections.name: Menu Highlights
sections.details: Asymmetrical grid showcasing 'food_highlight_1' and 'food_highlight_2'. List a few iconic Canarian dishes with prices. Use generous negative space.

sections.name: Reservation System (Interactive)
sections.details: Split layout: Left side 'interior_vibe' image. Right side: Interactive Shadcn Calendar & Form. Use pure solid background (#F2EDE4) for the form container with 1px border. Input fields must have high contrast focus states.

sections.name: Location & FAQ
sections.details: Google Maps embed for 'Av. Viera y Clavijo, 12, Adeje'. Contact info (Phone: 922 78 16 35). A short, elegant FAQ section using Shadcn Accordion.

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Dark background (#1A1A1A) to match the logo. Massive typography for a final 'Let's Talk' or 'Te Esperamos' CTA. Simple navigation links.

components_and_tech.shadcn_overrides: Do not use default Shadcn styles. Override Calendar, Select (for language), Input, and Accordion with terracotta focus rings and earthy rounded corners (rounded-none or rounded-md, not massive pills).
components_and_tech.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with a thin stroke-width (1.5) for elegance.
components_and_tech.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='lang-selector', data-testid='reserve-button', data-testid='reservation-calendar').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts from Google Fonts via next/font or standard import.
Implement the dark header (#1A1A1A) to camouflage the black background of the provided PNG logo perfectly.
The Hero overlay should be minimal (max bg-black/40) to let the food imagery shine.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the asymmetrical bento layouts; only use Shadcn for the Calendar, Select (Language), and Forms.

Ensure the Reservation system contains a real interactive calendar (Shadcn Calendar component) and time slot selection, plus email/name fields. Mock the email confirmation submission flow but make the UI robust.
Embed Google Maps pointing to 'Av. Viera y Clavijo, 12, Adeje, Santa Cruz de Tenerife, Spain'.
Add Multi-language state (ES, EN, DE). At minimum, mock the translation toggling for key headings to show functionality.
